title: Collapse groups on shared board?
excerpt: Is there a way to collapse all groups on a shared board (Shareable link). I have the board embedded, but it takes up so much space with the groups all expanded by default. Thanks in advance.

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to collapse all groups on a shared board (Shareable link). I have the board embedded, but it takes up so much space with the groups all expanded by default. Thanks in advance.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Yep! Click the three dots to the left of any group and choose ‘Collapse all groups’

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @Clover_Gal , it is set like that and before I generated the share link, but is still expanding all groups on the public view. I’ll reach out to Support.

posts.author: STNSteph (Steph Diaz)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever get anywhere with this? I am still seeing the same behavior. Thanks!
